backend.changelog: Virtual components (SW Make Virtual, e.g. Copy of spider) now generate STEP and 3D PDF reliably instead of intermittently coming out one short. The post-run hint no longer warns about a format you did not select this run.

cadBridge.changelog: Resolve virtual components by their stable child name so STEP and 3D PDF are produced for them (fixes the in-session vs BOM parent-name mismatch that left them missing on a fresh cache).
